description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
readme_excerpt: CubeSandbox Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox Service for AI Agents Cube Sandbox is a high-performance, out-of-the-box secure sandbox service built on RustVMM and KVM. It supports both single-node deployment and easy scaling to multi-node clusters.
